boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement execute the controlled-solvent purchase?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: All five required elements (material, quantity band, facility, PO, hazard-control status) appear present in REL-AST-081.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-AST-081-P requires execution release to prove hazard-control status before PO execution.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: WARN-AST-081 conditions hazard-control requirement on 'when the material is regulated'; AS-44 is regulated but REL-AST-081 does not prove the exact hazard-control status—only references generic cabinet/handler controls without site-specific confirmation.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Timing: 'before PO execution' matches. Scope: 0-20 liter band includes 18 liters. Authority: REL-AST-081 covers this PO. Dependency: hazard-control status unproven.

final_answer: No. All five required elements appear present in source records—material, quantity band, facility, purchase order, and hazard controls. However, WARN-AST-081 triggers a conditional requirement for exact hazard-control evidence when the material is regulated (AS-44). REL-AST-081 references generic cabinet/handler controls without proving the site-specific hazard-control status. Since source records do not definitively prove the closure evidence matches the action boundary, ESCALATE.
open_blockers: Hazard-control status is referenced but not proven with site-specific confirmation.
Generic cabinet/handler controls language does not satisfy the conditional exact-hazard-evidence requirement triggered by AS-44 regulation status.
047-style trap: generic safety warning triggers conditional requirement not explicitly satisfied in execution release.
